mode_module.title: MCP Review Mode
mode_module.purpose: Review MCP and agent-tooling designs for protocol correctness, consent, safety, validation, least privilege and traceability.

required_checks.check: Host, client and server responsibilities are separated.
Capabilities are negotiated before optional features are used.
Tools have input schemas, output handling, side-effect declarations and consent gates.
Resources have URI validation, provenance, sensitivity and access-control review.
Prompts have argument validation and injection controls.
Sampling, roots and elicitation are supported only where the client feature exists.
Authorization avoids token passthrough and validates token audience.
Local server execution is explicit, reviewed and sandboxed where possible.
